caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits before a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His shirt features the white text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK", with the word "SHIT" appearing in a larger, dripping font. To his right, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt. A logo consisting of a red circle and the text "ROCKY" is visible in the lower corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position, shifting his gaze and slightly adjusting his facial expression as he speaks. He looks downward and slightly to the left, then turns his head toward the right and back again, maintaining a focused but relaxed demeanor while positioned in front of the microphone.
